closureCriteria.criterion: buy, sell, bid, ask, cancel, accept, settle, and rights-transfer models exist
evidence: packages/btd/src/exchange.ts defines AssetPackExchangeOrder with sell, buy, bid, and ask order kinds and open, accepted, cancelled, expired, settled, and failed states
createAssetPackExchangeOrder, cancelAssetPackExchangeOrder, acceptAssetPackExchangeOrder, settleAssetPackExchangeOrder, and buildAssetPackRightsTransferReceipt implement the minimal lifecycle
packages/btd/__tests__/v27-crypto-primitives.test.ts exercises all four order kinds plus cancel, accept, settle, and rights transfer

closureCriteria.criterion: minimal Exchange receipts replay order and ownership state
evidence: buildAssetPackRightsTransferReceipt emits a BTC-priced rights-transfer receipt for the settled AssetPack range
packages/api/src/routes/btd-crypto.ts builds Terminal journal entries for exchange_order and rights_transfer actions with receipt roots, ledger anchors, and Exchange sequence
protocol-demonstration/src/receipt-schemas.js exposes the btd_asset_pack_rights_transfer receipt family and the demonstration test proves a rights transfer with fee, policy, and ledger evidence

closureCriteria.criterion: Exchange rows persist BTC price, range, order state, parties, policy hash, receipt root, and ledger proof linkage
evidence: supabase/migrations/002_v27_btd_crypto_registry.sql defines btd_exchange_orders and btd_rights_transfer_receipts with BTC-only price, range, wallet, state, access-policy, receipt, Exchange sequence, and ledger-anchor constraints
packages/orm/src/models/btd-registry.ts exposes insertExchangeOrder, updateExchangeOrder, and insertRightsTransferReceipt on the Bitcode-native registry model
packages/api/src/routes/__tests__/btd-crypto.test.ts proves explicit commit behavior for exchange order insertion and rights-transfer receipt insertion

closureCriteria.criterion: rights transfer cannot bypass access policy or ledger/proof requirements
evidence: buildAssetPackRightsTransferReceipt requires a settled order, non-empty accessPolicyHash, non-empty btcFeeReceiptId, and non-empty ledgerAnchorId
btd_rights_transfer_receipts requires ledger_anchor_id text NOT NULL and a non-empty ledger-anchor check
package and demonstration tests reject rights-transfer attempts without a settled order or ledger anchor

closureCriteria.criterion: commercial API route is unversioned and commit-gated
evidence: uapi/app/api/btd/asset-pack-exchange/route.ts binds the Next.js App Router endpoint without a versioned route prefix
registry writes occur only when commitToRegistry is explicitly true

validatedCommands.notes: Jest reports pre-existing duplicate manual mock warnings outside the V27 package/API slice.
Jest reports pre-existing duplicate manual mock warnings outside the V27 ORM slice.

nonPromotionAssertions: BITCODE_SPEC.txt remained V26 until Gate 16 promotion
BITCODE_SPEC_V27_PROVEN.md did not exist until Gate 16 promotion
Gate 12 closure does not claim V28 market depth, full order-book UX, live value-bearing settlement, generated V27 proof-family closure, or V27 promotion
All BTD API route paths remain unversioned
